description: Sac 2 Art 4 providing for the re cl am a lion of a fugitive slave cannot authorize uch reclamation from any of the states of the north west territory unless the fugi tive has escaped from one of the original stales This position is strengthened by the consideration that the want of qualification in the language of said clause in the feder al constitution was undoubtedly owing to the fact that it was introduced and adopted with scarcely any discussion No attention seems to have been bestowed upon its bearings on the ordinance We refer the reader to the Madison Papers page 14481456 We shall conclude our article by a quotation from a distinguished statesman and profound jurist which will show that our doctrine respecting the supremacy of this ordinance is not a new one Daniel Webster in his celebrated Speech on Footes resolution 1830 thus alluded to this instrument At thefoundation of these constitutions of tho northwestern states lies the ordinance of 1787 We are accustomed sir to praise the lawgivers of antiquity we help to perpetuate the fame of Solon and Lyrurgus but I doubt whether one single law of any lawgiver ancient or modern lias prod
